nasb.text: For David, after he had served the purpose of God in his own generation, fell asleep, and was laid among his fathers and underwent decay;

esv.text: For David, after he had served the purpose of God in his own generation, fell asleep and was laid with his fathers and saw corruption,

cnv.text: “大衛在他自己的世代裡，遵行了　神的計劃，就睡了，歸回他列祖那裡，見了朽壞。

ccb.text: “大卫在世时遵行上帝的旨意，最后死了，葬在他祖先那里，肉身也朽坏了。

csbs.text: 就是说，大卫虽然在自己的世代，遵行了神的计划之后就睡了，归到他祖先那里，并且经历了腐朽，
